properties.name: bootui.startup.enabled
properties.description: Install a BufferingApplicationStartup automatically while BootUI is active so the Startup Timeline panel has data.

properties.name: bootui.startup.capacity
properties.description: Maximum startup steps retained by BootUI's auto-installed startup buffer. Values less than or equal to zero disable the buffer.

properties.name: bootui.force-web
properties.description: While BootUI is active, force a non-web (command-line) application into a servlet web application so the BootUI console can be served. Has no effect on applications that are already servlet web applications or that are explicitly configured as reactive. Set to false to leave the host application's web-application type untouched.

properties.name: bootui.trust-container-gateway
properties.description: Trust the auto-detected container default gateway as a single /32 so BootUI works out of the box inside a container with a published port (host->container traffic is SNAT'd to the gateway) without a broad bootui.trusted-proxies CIDR. AUTO trusts it only when running inside a container; ON trusts a detected gateway even if container heuristics are inconclusive; OFF never trusts it. Relaxes only the source-address check; the Host allow-list and cross-site write protections stay in force.
